_comment: Known pre-existing UI test failures as of Phase 205 triage (docs/plans/phase_205_pre_existing_test_debt.plan.md). Not a target to reach — a ceiling. scripts/check-ui-test-baseline.mjs fails the build if failures grow beyond this list. Remove an entry once its test is fixed; never add an entry to silence a new failure without root-causing it first.

src/__tests__/auth.test.js: auth store login() stores token and username
auth store logout() clears token and username
